settings.title: How long does shipping take?
settings.text: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. Express shipping (2–3 business days) is available at checkout. Orders placed before 2pm EST ship the same day.

settings.title: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.text: Yes — free standard shipping on all orders over $100.

settings.title: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.text: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 1 hour of purchase. After that, we’re unable to make changes as orders are processed quickly. Contact us right away and we’ll do our best.

settings.title: Do you ship internationally?
settings.text: We currently ship to Canada, the US, the UK, and Australia. Shipping rates and times vary by destination and are calculated at checkout.

settings.title: What is your return policy?
settings.text: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition with tags attached.

settings.title: How do I start a return?
settings.text: Use our returns portal to submit your request. Once approved, you’ll receive a prepaid return label by email within 24 hours.

settings.title: Can I exchange for a different size or colour?
settings.text: Yes. Start an exchange through the returns portal and select the item you’d like instead. Exchanges ship free of charge.

settings.title: When will I receive my refund?
settings.text: Refunds are processed within 5 business days of receiving your return. You’ll receive a confirmation email once it’s been issued.

settings.title: How do I find my size?
settings.text: Each product page includes a size guide with measurements. If you’re between sizes, we generally recommend sizing up for a relaxed fit or down for a more fitted look.

settings.title: Do your clothes run true to size?
settings.text: Most styles run true to size. Any exceptions are noted in the product description.

settings.title: What if something doesn’t fit?
settings.text: No problem — start a free exchange through our returns portal and we’ll get the right size to you.
